case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES vs. THOMAS, WOODROW S.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, WOODROW S. $8,275.30 PRINCIPAL, $1,175.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $274.67 INTEREST, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,837.97
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, WOODROW S. $19,601.60 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,601.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES SERVED DEC-06-2007, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, WOODROW S. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JAN-11-2008 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
